payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up view (≈0.8 m) of a dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel, simple top molding and a small round knob at the lower-right; the door appears slightly worn and the crop is edge-cropped/partial.
